name: The Fool
upright: A new path opens. Trust the step.

name: The Magician
upright: You already have the tools. Use them.
reversed: Scattered power, manipulation, or unused ability.

name: The High Priestess
reversed: Blocked intuition or refusal to listen inward.

name: The Hermit
upright: Step back. Clarity comes in solitude.
reversed: Isolation, avoidance, or fear of inner truth.

name: The Chariot
upright: Victory comes through discipline and direction.
reversed: Loss of control or misdirected force.

name: Page of Cups
upright: Stay open. Something subtle is speaking.
reversed: Emotional immaturity or ignored inner signals.

name: Two of Swords
upright: A decision waits for clear sight.

name: Nine of Cups
reversed: Pleasure without depth or misread fulfillment.
